titleStmt.title: SII 10.770: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 770. (A.R. No. 494 of 1906.) ON A SLAB NEAR GOVINDA RAO'S HOUSE IN PULIVENDLA, PULLIVENDLA TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT. Ś. 1613. (Prajōtpatti)

summary.p: Records the terms offered by the order of Muhammad Jāfar to induce merchants from other places to come and settle down in Pulviṁddula which had been deserted.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya
śālivāhanaśakavarṣaṁbbulu
1613 Agu nēṭi prajōtpattinā
masaṁvatsara phālguṇa ba 12 śu
hajarati mahammajjāpharāsāhēbu
lavāri śalvuna rājaśrī vāsudēva
narasā . ha . sa . pulviṁddulagāru
vrāyiṁccina śabdaśāsanaṁ pulviṁddula pē
ṭa pāḍai vartakulu cāraka vuṁḍiri ganaka
yiṁdunimitaṁ basvapaṭnaṁ rebbaḷiga cannappa
cetukala malakappa modalaina staḷaparasta
ḷaṁ dēśaṁ vāriki prajalaku yiccina
kavulu kritaṁ divāṇānaku kōmaṭlu
gānulavāru vaṁttula prakāraṁ veccaṁ
yistā vuṁdduru ganaka Adinimittaṁ
grāmānaku kōmaṭlu gānulavāru cāra
ka vuṁḍḍagānu vaṁttuvāsulu veṭṭikaḍāyamulu
maṁnniṁccināraṁ yiṁduku yavaru Ā
śina vāni Ālini caluvādivā
niki yicciri Ani vrāyiṁ
ccina śabdaśāsanaṁ
Digital edition of SII 10.770 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
